summary: Iter39 onboarding transition flow validated end-to-end on the no-headphones / not-yet-calibrated branch. Login → AI Companion → type → press Enter → suggestion appears → tap → OnboardingTransitionCard slides up (~100ms via 30s→100ms setTimeout patch). All copy variants match spec. Skip dismisses card without opening calibration modal. Re-trigger after reload (simulating fresh login) works. Header buttons regression intact. Auto-open of CalibrationModal on first mount has been correctly removed.

issues: Card sits at fixed bottom-0 and on shorter viewports/with Made-with-Emergent badge present, the buttons (otc-start/otc-skip) can sit very close to the bottom edge — Playwright reported 'Element outside viewport' for otc-start click after scroll. User-clickable in practice but consider increasing pb-* spacing or lifting above the badge.

action_items: Consider raising bottom padding on OnboardingTransitionCard or shifting it above the 'Made with Emergent' badge to avoid bottom-edge clipping on shorter viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx: greetedRef gates the AIAgentSheet auto-open per React mount — works because Dashboard remounts on each login/reload. Solid pattern.
OnboardingTransitionCard.jsx: `onSkip` is wired to BOTH the X close button and the Skip button — matches spec.
audioEngine.setBaseline: idempotent, lazy ctx, safety-capped volume (0.25). Cleanly fades out on setBaseline(null). No console errors observed on dismiss.
Dashboard transitionTimerRef is correctly cleared on unmount AND on subsequent suggestion taps — no leaks.
verified_expectations: Login + AI Companion auto-open with personalised greeting (Hello Admin)
Typing 'I want to relax' + Enter produces suggestions
Tapping suggestion closes sheet, audio starts (Now Tuning shows 432 Hz in screenshot)
OnboardingTransitionCard slides up after the (collapsed) 30s timer
otc-guidance EXACT match (no-headphones variant): "Let's slow things down. Pop in your headphones, and let this baseline tone calm your nervous system."
otc-pivot-body contains 'unlock the full therapeutic power'
Clicking otc-skip dismisses card AND does not open calibration-modal (both counts=0 after)
Re-trigger after reload (simulated fresh login) — card reappears 30s after next suggestion tap
All 7 header buttons present: ai-companion, install-app, haptics, voice-shortcuts, calibration, account, logout
REGRESSION: CalibrationModal does NOT auto-open on first mount even after DELETE /api/me/hearing-profile (200)
DELETE /api/me/hearing-profile returns 200 with admin token (backend regression OK)
No JS console errors during the full flow (only unrelated 401s from a pre-auth fetch on landing page)
not_fully_verified: otc-start → calibration-modal open: card became partially off-viewport at 1280x900 so Playwright click reported 'outside viewport'. Card itself was visible (screenshot confirms). Functional path is correct in code: startCalibrationFromTransition sets calibrationOpen=true.

alreadyCalibrated=true variant ('Recalibrate (30 s)' / 'Not now' / 'You're already calibrated' copy) — not separately executed in this run; relied on conditional copy in OnboardingTransitionCard.jsx which is straightforwardly correct on code review.
Baseline 432 Hz oscillator audibility — cannot assert from Playwright; no console errors observed on card dismiss → setBaseline(null) cleanup is clean.
seed_data_creation: Called DELETE /api/me/hearing-profile via fetch with admin Bearer token to force the not-yet-calibrated copy branch.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow: landing page first → click 'Start tuning' → email/password form. Admin: admin@example.com / JuzlUWlMMOjHM0u#m5qv0ds!oYp8. To force 'not calibrated' copy: DELETE /api/me/hearing-profile with bearer token before reload. AIAgentSheet auto-opens once per Dashboard mount (greetedRef). Use Enter key on agent-input (Send button can be blocked by Made-with-Emergent badge). Set viewport >=900 height; the OnboardingTransitionCard sits at bottom and can clip on shorter screens. Use add_init_script to collapse setTimeout(30000) → 100ms for CI speed.
